title: Complete Challenge
description: 3-round circuit with jump lunges and plank followed by a burpees and crunches pyramid

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge + torso rotation + arm to the sky

exercises.name: Side shuffles
exercises.instructions: Quick lateral shuffles, 3-4 steps each side

exercises.name: Decline push-ups
exercises.instructions: Feet raised on a chair, body braced

exercises.name: Shoulder plank
exercises.instructions: In high plank, tap the opposite shoulder alternating

exercises.name: Jump squats
exercises.instructions: Explosive squat with jump, land softly

exercises.name: Superman
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, lift arms and legs simultaneously, hold 2s

exercises.name: Burpees no push-up
exercises.instructions: Drop down, jump feet back, come back, jump up

exercises.name: Crunches
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, lift shoulders, brace the abs

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate cat and cow, breathe

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
